$slug..write: auth != null && ((!newData.exists() && (!data.exists() || data.child('uid').val() == auth.uid)) || (newData.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && (!data.exists() || data.child('uid').val() == auth.uid)))

$pid..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid) || (data.exists() && data.child('uid').val() == auth.uid))
$pid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['uid','title','description','eloMin','role','queueType','createdAt']) && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && newData.child('title').isString() && newData.child('title').val().length > 0 && newData.child('title').val().length <= 200 && newData.child('description').isString() && newData.child('description').val().length <= 2000 && newData.child('eloMin').isString() && newData.child('role').isString() && (newData.child('queueType').val() == 'duo' || newData.child('queueType').val() == 'flex' || newData.child('queueType').val() == 'clash'))

$rid..validate: !newData.exists() || (newData.hasChildren(['fromUid','toUid','reason','detail','createdAt']) && newData.child('reason').isString() && newData.child('reason').val().length > 0 && newData.child('reason').val().length <= 64 && newData.child('detail').isString() && newData.child('detail').val().length <= 500 && newData.child('toUid').isString())

$fromUid..validate: newData.hasChildren(['communication','skill','toxicity','overall','createdAt']) && newData.child('communication').isNumber() && newData.child('communication').val() >= 1 && newData.child('communication').val() <= 5 && newData.child('skill').isNumber() && newData.child('skill').val() >= 1 && newData.child('skill').val() <= 5 && newData.child('toxicity').isNumber() && newData.child('toxicity').val() >= 1 && newData.child('toxicity').val() <= 5 && newData.child('overall').isNumber() && newData.child('overall').val() >= 1 && newData.child('overall').val() <= 5 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber()
